title: rubus rivularis var. dasyacanthus
intro: Rubus rivularis var. dasyacanthus, also known as Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a plant species in the Rubus genus, which includes raspberries and blackberries. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurveda, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. dasyacanthus include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include making teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
